---
title: "02_build_core_objects"
author: "Francis Barnabe Kengne"
date: "2026-03-21"
output: html_document
---

Nota: After running this file, We should run the 99_fix_rda_files.R to correct dataset elements.

```{r}
library(ssamixr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(usethis)

# 1. Load the aggregated data from the package
devtools::load_all()   # ensures MatrixData_aggregated is available
data("MatrixData_aggregated", package = "ssamixr")

# 2. Build per-matrix list
per_matrix_list <- build_per_matrix_list(MatrixData_aggregated)

# 3. Build country-level list
country_list <- build_country_list(per_matrix_list)

# 4. Build metadata table (ssa_matrices_meta)
ssa_matrices_meta <- purrr::map_dfr(per_matrix_list, function(mo) {
  tibble::tibble(
    matrix_id      = mo$MatrixId,
    study_id       = mo$Study,
    author_year    = mo$FacetAuthorYear,
    country        = mo$Country,
    location_type  = mo$LocationText,
    row_age_groups = paste(mo$RowLabels, collapse = ";"),
    col_age_groups = paste(mo$ColLabels, collapse = ";")
  )
})

# 5. Build list of matrices (ssa_matrices_list)
ssa_matrices_list <- purrr::map(per_matrix_list, function(mo) {
  list(
    matrix      = mo$Matrix,
    row_labels  = mo$RowLabels,
    col_labels  = mo$ColLabels,
    study_id    = mo$Study,
    author_year = mo$FacetAuthorYear,
    country     = mo$Country,
    location_type = mo$LocationText
  )
})
names(ssa_matrices_list) <- ssa_matrices_meta$matrix_id

# 6. Save all objects as package data
usethis::use_data(
  per_matrix_list,
  country_list,
  ssa_matrices_meta,
  ssa_matrices_list,
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```
